testsuite.name: FreshFare.testcases.smokeTest.smokeTest

testcase.name: initialize

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 150 Current browser version is 149.0.7827.201 with binary path /Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome Host info: host: 'Macs-MacBook-Air.local', ip: 'fe80:0:0:0:18c9:11e7:4e11:d0b2%en0' Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '26.5.1', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--start-maximized], extensions: []}}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--start-maximized], extensions: []}}
